concerns.text: Success criteria include specific numerical thresholds (70% papers, 0.02 deviation, 0.01 std dev, 20% variance, 5 items, 2 experts) that should be deferred to implementation phase per spec template guidance. Planning docs should state WHAT is measured and the reference, not pre-asserted numbers.

SC-005 adds domain expert validation ('approved by at least two domain experts (simulated via a review step)') not present in the original idea. The idea only specifies drafting a checklist, not external validation. This is scope creep.
